sections.aboutTtg: TotalTech Global is a full-stack business operations partner serving clients across Europe, North America, and Asia. We design and run the back-office systems that power modern companies - from CX and BPO to IT infrastructure and software delivery.
sections.theRole: We are looking for a Senior BPO Operations Manager to lead and scale our global back-office delivery teams. You will own end-to-end operations for key client accounts, drive SLA performance, and build the systems that help our clients grow without friction.
responsibilities: Oversee day-to-day BPO delivery across multiple client accounts and geographies
Own SLA/KPI performance - define, track, and continuously improve metrics
Build and manage high-performing remote teams of 20-80 agents/specialists
Partner with client stakeholders on QBRs, escalation management, and expansion planning
Identify automation and AI opportunities to reduce manual overhead
Collaborate with Technology and CX teams to design seamless operational pipelines
Drive onboarding of new accounts from transition to steady-state
requirements: 8+ years in BPO, contact center, or shared services operations
Proven track record managing large remote/distributed teams
Strong command of CRM tools (Zendesk, Salesforce, HubSpot)
Experience with SLA-driven environments and performance dashboards
Excellent client-facing communication and presentation skills
Ability to work across UTC timezones (flexibility required)
niceToHave: Experience scaling operations from 0 to 100+ headcount
Familiarity with AI/automation tools like ChatGPT, Intercom AI, or similar
Background in e-commerce, SaaS, or marketplace operations

title: Full-Stack Software Developer

sections.aboutTtg: TotalTech Global builds digital products and internal platforms for modern service businesses. We blend product thinking, delivery excellence, and operations depth to help teams ship reliable software quickly.
sections.theRole: As a Full-Stack Software Developer, you will design and build production-ready features across web applications and internal tools. You will work closely with product, design, and operations teams to solve high-impact workflow challenges.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain full-stack features using modern TypeScript stacks
Translate product requirements into scalable technical solutions
Integrate APIs and third-party services with secure, observable implementations
Write maintainable, tested code and contribute to CI/CD pipelines
Collaborate in code reviews and architecture discussions
Improve performance, reliability, and developer experience
requirements: 3+ years building web products with React and Node.js
Strong TypeScript fundamentals across frontend and backend
Experience with relational or document databases
niceToHave: Exposure to workflow automation or AI-assisted product features
Experience working with distributed teams across timezones

whatWeOffer: Opportunity to work on global products
Learning stipend for tools and certifications

sections.aboutTtg: TotalTech Global partners with growth-stage and enterprise teams to build customer journeys that are measurable, scalable, and deeply human.
sections.theRole: We are hiring a Customer Experience Strategist to shape end-to-end CX programs for key accounts. You will identify friction points, define service standards, and orchestrate cross-functional teams to deliver better outcomes.
responsibilities: Map customer journeys and identify critical service gaps
Design CX playbooks and service recovery frameworks
Define CX metrics and dashboards with stakeholders
Partner with operations and product teams to implement improvements
Facilitate workshops and client reviews with actionable recommendations
requirements: 5+ years in CX strategy, support operations, or service design
Strong analytical skills with comfort using customer and operational data
Experience with CRM/support systems and ticketing workflows
Excellent facilitation, storytelling, and stakeholder management
niceToHave: Background in SaaS or digital services

sections.aboutTtg: At TotalTech Global, design is central to how we solve operational complexity. We craft experiences that are elegant for users and efficient for delivery teams.
sections.theRole: As a Senior UI/UX Product Designer, you will lead discovery, interaction design, and visual execution across multiple digital products. You will work closely with engineers and strategists to deliver polished, usable experiences.
responsibilities: Lead product discovery through research, interviews, and rapid prototyping
Translate business goals into intuitive user flows and interfaces
Create and evolve scalable design systems
Collaborate with engineering to ensure high-fidelity implementation
Present design rationale to stakeholders and clients
requirements: 5+ years of end-to-end product design experience
Strong portfolio showcasing systems thinking and shipped products
Proficiency with modern design and prototyping tools
Ability to balance UX quality with delivery constraints
niceToHave: Familiarity with motion design and interaction animation
